# B2BNest

> AI-powered all-in-one business platform offering 50+ free and affordable tools for entrepreneurs and small businesses — CRM, project management, invoicing, AI document generation, financial tracking, and more.

B2BNest replaces multiple expensive SaaS subscriptions with a single, intelligent business ecosystem. The platform combines free utilities (QR generator, currency converter, business name generator) with affordable premium tools (CRM, project management, AI assistants) starting at $9.99/month.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the B2BNest platform and featured tools
- [About](/about): Company mission, values, and story
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, features, and subscription tiers
- [Business Tools](/business-tools): Full catalog of 50+ free and premium business tools
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the B2BNest team
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on business documentation, compliance, and operational efficiency
- [Knowledge Base](/knowledge-base): Guides and how-to articles
- [AI Showcase](/ai-showcase): Demonstrations of AI capabilities
- [AI Studio](/ai-studio): AI-powered creation workspace
- [Fundraising](/fundraising): B2BNEST token presale information
- [Whitepaper](/whitepaper): Technical documentation and roadmap
- [Tokenomics](/tokenomics): Token distribution and economics
- [Live Charts](/live-charts): Market data and price tracking
- [Business News](/business-news): Latest business and tech news
- [Forum](/forum): Community discussion

## Categories

- [Human Resources](/categories/human-resources): HR document templates and tools
- [Legal Documents](/categories/legal-documents): Contract and legal templates
- [Financial Forms](/categories/financial-forms): Invoices, quotes, and financial templates
- [Marketing Materials](/marketing-materials): Marketing and branding resources
- [Operations](/categories/operations): Operational templates and checklists

- [Getting Started](/knowledge-base/getting-started): New user onboarding guide

- [Financial Tools Guide](/knowledge-base/financial-tools): Using invoicing, quotes, and HMRC tools
- [Workflows Guide](/knowledge-base/workflows): Building automation workflows
- [Security Guide](/knowledge-base/security): Security and 2FA setup
